name: Liquidation and Distribution Account Pack
description: Documents required to prepare and lodge a Liquidation and Distribution account for a deceased estate with the Master of the High Court. Collects the executor's appointment letter, evidence of death, identity of the deceased, the L&D account draft, and the IDs of every beneficiary named in the account.

items.name: Executor's Letters of Authority
items.description: Letters of Executorship or Letters of Authority issued by the Master of the High Court confirming the executor's appointment over the deceased estate.

items.name: Death certificate
items.description: Official death certificate issued by the Department of Home Affairs for the deceased.

items.name: ID of deceased
items.description: Certified copy of the deceased's South African ID document or passport bio page.

items.name: Liquidation & Distribution account draft
items.description: Draft Liquidation and Distribution account prepared in terms of the Administration of Estates Act, reflecting all assets, liabilities, and distribution to heirs prior to lodgement with the Master.

items.name: Beneficiary ID documents
items.description: Certified ID copies for every beneficiary or heir named in the Liquidation and Distribution account. Combine into a single PDF where possible.
